claims.claim_text: The government is in control of personal vaccination decisions.
The COVID vaccine poses a minimal threat to young children.
The decision to vaccinate a child should be made solely by the child and their parents.
Current required vaccinations have been in use with full FDA approval for decades.
The COVID vaccine has not been in use with full FDA approval for decades.
California has one of the highest COVID vaccination rates in the country.
The virus is still spreading in California despite high vaccination rates.
Rural schools will be the hardest hit by the new vaccination mandate.
Enrollment in rural schools will drastically decline due to the new mandate.
School district budgets will crumble as a result of decreased enrollment in rural schools.
The learning and social losses in rural schools will be massive due to the vaccination mandate.
